# v1 — Frozen

**Status:** Frozen reviewed version. Do not edit.

**Reviewed by:** Working group (Altadena Village · CoLab · Alting · Altagether)
**Review date:** May 18, 2026
**Archived:** May 19, 2026

This folder preserves the exact state of the deck + proposal as reviewed by the working group on the evening of May 18. All subsequent edits land in the root of the repo (v2). This snapshot is for reference and diffing only.

## Files
- `index.html` — the deck (10 slides)
- `proposal.html` — the structured proposal (styled)
- `proposal.md` — the structured proposal (markdown source)
- `README.md` — the repo README as it stood on May 18
